title: Ringwood Dental not complying with all regulations, say CQC inspectors
summary: A dental practice in Ringwood lacks “effective leadership” and is not complying with all regulations, according to inspectors.

title: icddr,b identifies 1st cluster of Zika virus cases in Bangladesh from 2023 samples
summary: The discovery came from a small-scale targeted screening of patient samples

title: How to protect cats from bird flu
summary: Though cases of infection are rare, cats seem especially susceptible to the bird flu virus.

title: Living a long time isn't just about good genes, a new study says. 4 lifestyle changes that can improve your longevity.
summary: Factors like your income and how much sleep you get are more predictive of how long you'll live than genes, an Oxford study found.

title: Teaching gut and brain health for seniors in Wilmington, NC
summary: Research suggests that an unhealthy gut can negatively impact brain function, leading to cognitive issues such as memory loss.

title: Kidney disease awareness promoted by WVU Medicine
summary: March is National Kidney Month and WVU Medicine Barnesville Hospital wants to help you reduce your risk of developing chronic kidney disease.

title: Infectious disease experts answer questions about cats and bird flu risk
summary: Cats are susceptible to avian flu, heightening concerns about bird flu spreading from stray and domesticated cats to humans, and eventually from humans to humans.

title: Scientists' massive discovery: new part of the immune system
summary: Scientists in Israel have discovered a new part of the human immune system, shedding light on a potential "untapped source of natural antibiotics."

title: Popular pregnancy painkiller linked to ADHD in children, new study warns
summary: A study in Nature Mental Health links paracetamol use during pregnancy to a higher risk of ADHD in children. The research tracked acetaminophen levels
